title: Mild Northern Thai Butternut Squash Curry
description: A rich and creamy curry featuring butternut squash and rest-meat, perfect for a comforting meal. This dish is FODMAP-friendly and serves as a great hangover cure.

ingredients.name: rest-meat
ingredients.notes: such as beef or pork, sliced

instructions: Heat the peanut oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the sliced rest-meat and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the curry paste and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the cubed butternut squash and cook, stirring occasionally, for 5 minutes.
Pour in the coconut milk and add the fish sauce, brown sugar, and salt.
Stir to combine and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, until the squash is tender, about 15 minutes.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro and serve over rice or noodles.
